title: Smoky Takikomi Gohan
description: A Japanese-inspired smoky rice dish, perfect for a hearty lunch or dinner. The smoky flavors are balanced by the savory taste of the takikomi gohan.
instructions: Cook the Takikomi Gohan according to the package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the Sesame Oil over medium heat.
Add the flaked Cold Smoked Salmon and cook until lightly browned.
Add the Soy Sauce and Rice Vinegar to the pan and stir to combine.
Once the gohan is cooked, fluff it with a fork and mix with the salmon and sauce mixture.
Top with chopped Green Onions and serve.
